name: MessageBird (Bird)
description: Drive MessageBird / Bird (multichannel CPaaS — SMS, voice, WhatsApp via Bird, RCS) from any AI agent. 8 tools, AccessKey header auth.
instructions:
This connector uses the MessageBird API v1 (developers.messagebird.com).

**Note**: MessageBird rebranded to **Bird** in 2023 (bird.com). The API endpoints at rest.messagebird.com remain functional for existing customers as of 2025; new accounts may have different endpoint paths. Verify with your account dashboard.

**Setup**:
1. Sign in to https://dashboard.messagebird.com → **Developers → API access** → Live or Test → copy AccessKey.
2. Set `MESSAGEBIRD_ACCESS_KEY`.

**Authentication**: header `Authorization: AccessKey ${MESSAGEBIRD_ACCESS_KEY}` (literal 'AccessKey' prefix).

**Recipients format**: international phone numbers WITHOUT the `+` sign. e.g. `31612345678` for the Netherlands.

**Datacoding**: 'plain' (default GSM-7), 'unicode' (UCS-2, allows emoji but doubles cost), 'auto' (let MessageBird pick).

**Originator**: your sender ID. Can be alphanumeric (max 11 chars, sender-name approach) or a phone number you own/lease.

**Voice via API**: also possible (/calls endpoint) but call flows are complex — out of scope here for the MVP.

**Rate limits**: ~100 SMS/sec on standard, much higher with dedicated routes. On 429 back off.

tools.name: messagebird_send_sms
tools.description: Send an SMS. Required: originator + recipients + body.

originator.description: Sender ID (≤11 alphanumeric chars) or your owned phone number.

recipients.description: Array of phones in international format WITHOUT '+'. e.g. ['31612345678'].

body.description: Message body. With plain datacoding ≤160 chars per part.

reference.description: Free-text reference for delivery report correlation.

scheduledDatetime.description: ISO 8601 to schedule send up to 24h ahead.

tools.name: messagebird_get_message
tools.description: Get an SMS by ID with delivery status per recipient.

status.description: scheduled, sent, buffered, delivered, expired, delivery_failed, sent_failed.

tools.name: messagebird_send_voice_call
tools.description: Start an outbound voice call. The call follows the steps in callFlow (XML or JSON). Required: source + destination + callFlow.

source.description: Your number (international, no +). Must be MessageBird-issued or verified caller ID.

tools.name: messagebird_lookup_phone
tools.description: Look up phone number details: country, type (mobile/landline), formats. Useful for validation + carrier detection.

phoneNumber.description: Phone number to look up (international, no +).

countryCode.description: ISO country code if you have a local number that needs disambiguation.

tools.name: messagebird_verify_create
tools.description: Send a verification code (OTP) via SMS/voice. Default 6-digit code, 30 sec validity. Use messagebird_verify_check to validate.

template.description: Message template. Default 'Your verification code is %token.'. Must include %token literal.

language.description: For tts: en-us, en-gb, de-de, fr-fr, ...

tools.name: messagebird_verify_check
tools.description: Verify a token (OTP) against a previously-created verification ID.
